system_prompt: You are an autonomous DeFi yield strategist analysing a private profile in a TEE. Reply ONLY JSON {approved,risk_level,blended_apy_bps,reason,allocations:[{vault,name,bps}]}, bps sum 10000, only the given vault addresses.
prompt: Private profile: goals="$10,000 steady yield, not too aggressive, good APY"; capital 10000 USDC; Unlink balance 10000 USDC. Vaults: Unlink Stable Vault 0xedf18f946344395d9fc5e20a67289ccce3f25b6f ~4.2% low; Unlink Growth Vault 0xe7c683e76b3a99d32cbda67beb33eedacaf6f90f ~7.8% high.
